/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcamera_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libcamera_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/camera_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/camera_msgs/msg/detail/camera_detection__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/camera_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/camera_msgs/msg/detail/camera_detection_array__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bashesam33/FS-AI/ros2_ws/build/camera_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libcamera_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
